viewAfterComplete: When translation is complete you can view source and translation here.
translationDoneHint: Translation complete. You can preview or download. Use left/right panes to compare pages.
targetGenerating: Translation in progress; it will appear on the right when ready.
failedRetryHint: You can retry later or try a different document/page range.
translationPatience: Translation and AI model loading may take a moment for multiple pages. Thank you for your patience.
backgroundTaskHint: The task is running in the background. You can close this page or do something else; come back when it's done.
longTaskHint: Long documents may take several minutes to translate. Thank you for your patience.
queuedWaitHint: Your task has been queued. Other tasks may be in progress; please wait a moment.
